_comment: Regression test baseline. Updated by the regression-tester agent. Each key is a test name, value is {status, last_run, notes}.
_note: Full run against PepperTestApp on simulator. CLI-based (pepper-ctl). MCP tools not available in session. raw command crashes app.

pepper connects.notes: ping returns pong, screen returns screen_id=home_view with 5 tabs (connected to real app first, then recovered to test app)

look returns elements.notes: 19 interactive + 19 text elements on home_view screen

tap by text.notes: Tapped 'Health' tab via text strategy, screen changed from home_view to health_view

tap by point.notes: Tapped at (200,400) via hid_touch point strategy, acknowledged

back navigation.notes: back command executed, returned 'Navigated back'. Dismissed modal, app recovered to test app Controls tab.

input text into field.notes: Tapped 'Enter text here' textField, input 'test input 123', verified value='test input 123' in subsequent look

dismiss keyboard.notes: App crashed on dismiss_keyboard raw command (WebSocket connection lost: timed out). Same crash as 2026-03-30 baseline.

scroll down.notes: Scrolled down 200pt successfully, content shifted from 'Tap Me' to 'Notifications'/'Dark Mode'

scroll to element.notes: scroll --element 'Show Alert' and 'Push Detail' both return 'Element not found'. Off-screen elements not discoverable.

look scope filtering.notes: look --scope 'Toggles' returns 0 elements with SCOPE ERROR. Scope filtering doesn't match SwiftUI section headers.

look compact mode.notes: Skipped: compact mode only available via MCP tool. raw command crashes app.

find by predicate.notes: Skipped: find command only available via MCP tool.

read element properties.notes: read --id requires accessibility ID. No elements in test app expose explicit accessibility IDs. snapshot shows '? (?)' for all elements.

appearance toggle.notes: Skipped: appearance command only available via MCP tool. raw command crashes app.

network monitoring.notes: Skipped: network commands only available via MCP tool.

network websocket log and status.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools and test app WebSocket Client screen.

console capture.notes: Skipped: console commands only available via MCP tool.

timeline flight recorder.notes: Skipped: timeline command only available via MCP tool.

vars inspect.notes: Skipped: vars_inspect command only available via MCP tool.

defaults read.notes: Skipped: defaults command only available via MCP tool.

snapshot save and diff.notes: snapshot returned 42 elements on Controls tab. Diff not tested (MCP-only).

accessibility audit.notes: Skipped: accessibility_audit command only available via MCP tool. raw command crashes app.

look on empty screen.notes: Look returns successfully on Controls tab (18 interactive, 12 text). No empty screen available but no errors.

tap nonexistent element.notes: Returns clear error: 'Element not found by text: ... not found anywhere in the view hierarchy', no crash
